summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sales Dashboard application. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend dashboard displays all KPI cards, charts, and interactive elements correctly. Date filtering and data refresh functionality working as expected.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/config/excel POST endpoint saves Excel URL successfully
Backend API /api/dashboard/kpis returns complete KPI data with all required fields
Date filtering works for all periods (week, 2weeks, month, year)
All 8 KPI cards display data correctly (Total Revenue, Total Commission, Closed Deals, Closing Rate, Average Ticket, Total Visits, Avg Sales Cycle, Price Margin)
Date filter dropdown works and updates data dynamically
Refresh button is clickable and functional
All 4 charts display correctly (Unit Type Distribution, Revenue by Unit Type, Deal Status Distribution, Monthly Revenue Trend)
Sales records table displays data with proper headers and 10+ records
UI responsive design and layout working correctly
Data integration between backend and frontend working seamlessly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (All major functionality working)
